args.ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"other","RequestFeedback":false,"Summary":"Redesigned settings screen under SettingsPortal.tsx using the CoinPulse Design System. Integrates a two-tab dashboard (General Keys vs Facebook Tokens), a unified grid for the 7 API keys, bidirectional SQLite sync, live OpenRouter credit checking, and detailed advanced settings."}
args.Description: "Overhaul settings portal under SettingsPortal.tsx: supporting all 7 API keys from original app in localized localstorage with bidirectional sync to local SQLite table api_credentials, credit checking pings, and CoinPulse premium dark aesthetics"
